name: vglib-backend
description: This is the backend server for VGLib, a video game library management application. It provides RESTful APIs for managing video game collections, including adding, updating, and deleting games, as well as retrieving game information.
author: Yash Mahesh Burshe and Ben Piperno

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix ../frontend && npm run build --prefix ../frontend && rm -rf dist && mv ../frontend/dist ./dist
